content: This issue got me thinking if we should add a nice background processing queue to basic-webserver... Thoughts?
Might be hard to add in a useful way currently, but the idea fundamentally fits. I think even basic CLI should be able to spin up threads in the long term
Oh hmm...maybe we should just turn on atomic refcounting by default in roc. Then it should be possible to do more here and make a nice API.
I think that would be worth doing to start exploration.
